metadata.description: Curated examples of clearly categorized behavioral rules from generational knowledgebase.txt files.
metadata.selection_note: Examples were chosen for explicit fit to the category definitions, not for frequency.

fields.rule: Original rule wording from knowledgebase.txt, lightly normalized only by the extraction script.
fields.source_file: Relative path to the source knowledgebase.txt file.
fields.rule_index: 1-based rule index within the source file.

Communication.rule: After clearing threats, message teammate: confirm clear, report arrows remaining, signal ready for next wave.
Send warnings to teammates: "Warning: [mob type] approaching! IDs [IDs] ([distances]). [Plan]."
Communicate only changes: threats added/removed, health drops >5, or plans to regroup.
Messages ONLY via post-clear protocol; integers only.
Send concise messages only for new threats ("Zombies X,Y at D"), "Health low", "Clear pos x:z".
Disable all communication and text logging whenever health is below 12 or hostiles are within 20 blocks to prioritize processing time for survival.
Communication.source_file: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase\RunData\generationLine1\9\knowledgebase.txt
Communication.run: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase

Altruism.rule: On teammate death or low health message, drop 2 bread at your feet and send: "<BotX low/down>. Dropping bread. Status: health/food, threats."
Teammate reports low hp/down: drop 2 bread at feet, message "<BotX low/down>. Bread dropped. Regroup 0,0. My hp/food/arrows."

Teammate damaged/low/critical: Send 6 bread to them (create/use "send_bread_to_player" player=teammate food=bread count=6), attack closest threat. Message "Sending 6 bread to teammate / Assisting ID X."
Teammate health <12: Send 8+ bread/arrows, move_to_teammate_pos radius=5, assist closest. Message "Aid sent, moving to you."
If teammate health <12, drop 3 bread toward them and message "Bread for you."

Cooperate only to reduce mob pressure: if healthy, shoot or pull one hostile off a hurt ally from the side without body-blocking; if hurt, announce low health and retreat away from allies so mobs do not cluster.
Altruism.run: 23 Real Run 13 - State of the art

Mutualism.rule: Alert partner to incoming hostiles and coordinate coverage: melee close, bow range.
If teammates present, assign/accept roles: one melee tanks closest zombie, others equip bow and bow_attack next closest; rotate tank on "Low HP".
Test when clear: assign roles via message ("I tank melee" or "I bow support"), melee faces hostiles, bow stays 4-5 blocks behind and fires.
Early and safe: message "Role: Tank" or "Role: Kiter" to teammate; tank holds front line, kiter shoots from back.
Test focus fire: on 2+ zombies near tank, message "[Team] Focus [closest zombie ID]" then both attack it.
Divide labor: nearest agent attacks closest zombie, communicate targets to coordinate (e.g., "You 23, I 22").

Spatial Coordination & Architecture.rule: Move away from spawn (0,0) to x=-20 z=20 or similar safe spot when health <5 or alone.
Place oak planks to build quick walls or shelter when swarmed.
Use oak planks to build quick 2x2 shelter after mobs cleared.
After clear, send "Clear pos x:z"; loosely stay 8-12 blocks apart when safe to cover more area.
When two or more hostiles are within 6 blocks, use planks or blocks to build a 3-block high pillar under yourself to escape melee range.
Spatial Coordination & Architecture.source_file: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase\RunData\generationLine1\2\knowledgebase.txt
Spatial Coordination & Architecture.run: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase

Spatial Coordination & Architecture.rule: If health or hunger drops below 16, use a custom-defined action to build a fully enclosed 1x1x2 box around yourself and eat until both are full.
Spatial Coordination & Architecture.source_file: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase\RunData\generationLine1\9\knowledgebase.txt
Spatial Coordination & Architecture.run: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase

Cultural Scientific Method - Testing & M.rule: Test when health/food full and <2 threats: Assign roles via message ("I tank, you bow") and kite one zombie while teammate attacks from range.
Test when safe: Focus all fire on one zombie at a time ("Focusing [id]"); compare survival to spread attacks.
Test: Multiple zombies? Kite at 6+ blocks distance using bow shots while circling to avoid swarm.
Test defensive build: Place 2-high plank walls around gear pickup forming chokepoint when no immediate threats.
If a movement or tool call fails, immediately jump and place a block beneath you to reset enemy pathing and gain a tactical height advantage.
Cultural Scientific Method - Testing & M.source_file: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase\RunData\generationLine1\9\knowledgebase.txt
Cultural Scientific Method - Testing & M.run: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase

Cultural Scientific Method - Testing & M.rule: When a new wave appears, test the safer default: retreat first, use bow/kiting and blocks to split enemies, and switch to melee only after spacing is stable and one target is isolated.
Cultural Scientific Method - Testing & M.run: 23 Real Run 13 - State of the art

Self Preservation.rule: Eat bread until full when health drops below 10.
Eat bread immediately if health <12; eat to full if damaged or before fights.
Self Preservation.source_file: 21 Real Run 10 - only send message and do nothing tools\RunData\generationLine1\5\knowledgebase.txt
Self Preservation.run: 21 Real Run 10 - only send message and do nothing tools

Self Preservation.rule: If a hostile is within 5 blocks, execute a retreat of at least 15 blocks before attempting any other action to avoid damage during tool execution.
Self Preservation.source_file: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase\RunData\generationLine1\9\knowledgebase.txt
Self Preservation.run: 22 Real Run 12 - survival focus and gemini knowledgebase

Self Preservation.rule: At low health, prioritize escape over all damage: below 8 health, never melee unless trapped; sprint away, place blocks between you and hostiles if you have blocks, avoid allies' paths, and eat only after several blocks of clearance are secured.
Self Preservation.run: 23 Real Run 13 - State of the art

Self Preservation.rule: After danger is low, recover before moving on: eat available safe food until hunger is full or nearly full, equip the best armor, and keep the best weapon, food, and blocks accessible.
Self Preservation.run: 23 Real Run 13 - State of the art
